name: nick-personal-marketplace
description: Nick's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace featuring OMT and other productivity tools

plugins.name: omt
plugins.description: OMT - One Man Team: Your personal development squad powered by Agent-First workflow with 5 autonomous agents

plugins.name: readability
plugins.description: Readability Formatting: Enhances AI-generated text readability through proper alignment and formatting of markdown tables, ASCII art, and text-based diagrams

plugins.name: viz
plugins.description: Render markdown, Mermaid, and ~/.claude/plans/ files as formatted HTML — one skill, one script

plugins.name: jj
plugins.description: Jujutsu (jj) VCS helper: workflow commands, natural language operations, and Git-to-jj translation

plugins.name: apple-podcasts
plugins.description: Fetch Apple Podcasts episode audio download URLs via iTunes API and RSS feeds

plugins.name: markitdown
plugins.description: Convert PDF, Office documents, images, audio, and more to Markdown using Microsoft's MarkItDown

plugins.name: context-flow
plugins.description: [Experimental] Context-flow pipeline — agents defined by Context + Goal + Tools, not roles

plugins.name: gog
plugins.description: Google Workspace CLI skills — Gmail, Calendar, and Drive via gogcli (gog)

plugins.name: adr
plugins.description: Architecture Decision Records lifecycle management with MADR 4.0 and cross-reference consistency enforcement

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation with agent-browser CLI, Playwright test generation, and debug-to-test workflows

plugins.name: hook-guard
plugins.description: One-stop hook setup — detect project environment, generate Claude Code hooks and git pre-commit scripts with security checks and CLAUDECODE skip logic

plugins.name: fizzy
plugins.description: Interact with Fizzy via the Fizzy CLI — manage boards, cards, columns, comments, steps, reactions, tags, users, notifications, pins, webhooks, and account settings

plugins.name: obsidian-workspace
plugins.description: Obsidian Workspace — personal vault productivity: quick capture to journal, long-form notes, and project management via Obsidian CLI

plugins.name: discord-webhook
plugins.description: Send Discord webhook notifications with plain text or rich Embed format, multi-webhook routing
